objective: Per-tab fingerprint using browser context isolation (Solution 1)

specialist_outputs.output: CDPClient BrowserContext extension - instance/cdp.go updated with CreateBrowserContext, CloseBrowserContext, CreateTargetWithContext, GetTargets methods
ContextStore implementation - app/commands/tab_context_store.go created with BrowserContext, TabInfo, ContextStore types and methods
TabService implementation - app/commands/tab.go created with TabService struct and CreateTab, CloseTab, ListTabs, NavigateTab methods
InstanceService context integration - contextStores field added, GetCDPClientForTab and CloseAll integration
Wails bindings - app.go updated with CreateTab, CloseTab, ListTabs, NavigateTab methods
Wails type regeneration - TypeScript bindings regenerated with TabInfo, TabConfig, BrowserContext types and new methods
Integration testing - tests/integration/tab_test.go created with TC-001 to TC-007 test scenarios

scope.description: Implement per-tab fingerprint system using Chromium's BrowserContext isolation
key_components: CDPClient extension for browser context operations
